Completely rewrote `.agents/skills/release/SKILL.md` to implement a 5-phase gated deployment pipeline: (1) Pre-flight checks — verify deploy-config.bat exists, git tree clean, npm run build passes; (2) Security audit — run verify-no-secrets.sh, block on failures; (3) Version tag gate — read package.json version, check existing tags, interactive bump via ask_user_questions (patch/minor/major per MEM077), update package.json, git commit + tag + push; (4) Deploy — call deploy.bat via cmd.exe /c (with Git Bash fallback per MEM083/085); (5) Post-deploy verification — curl health check, report version + service status.

Key changes from the old SKILL.md:
- Replaced deploy-targets.json with deploy-config.bat as the single config source (per MEM079/MEM084)

- Added verify-no-secrets.sh security audit gate (Phase 2)
- Added structured 5-phase output format for observability

- Added cmd.exe /c execution path with Git Bash fallback
- YAML frontmatter preserved with name and description fields

tasks.title: Created start.bat NSSM startup script with fixed node.exe path, UTF-8 support, and ESM-compatible dotenv loading
tasks.one_liner: Created start.bat NSSM startup script with fixed node.exe path, UTF-8 support, and ESM-compatible dotenv loading
tasks.narrative:
Created `.agents/skills/release/scripts/start.bat` — the NSSM startup script was missing entirely. Built it from scratch with all fixes from the task plan:

1. **Fixed node.exe path**: Used `set "NODE_EXE=C:\Program Files\nodejs\node.exe"` with quoted set syntax to prevent `\n` being interpreted as newline. Verified single-line via `cat -A`.
2. **Added UTF-8 support**: `chcp 65001 >nul 2>&1` per MEM047.
3. **Fixed ESM dotenv loading**: Replaced broken `require('dotenv').config()` with `--import dotenv/config` (dotenv v17+ ESM-compatible).

# T02: Added M004 learnings to development-notes.md: deploy.bat pitfalls, agent E2E spawn pattern, dual auth, CLI error format

**Added M004 learnings to development-notes.md: deploy.bat pitfalls, agent E2E spawn pattern, dual auth, CLI error format**

## What Happened

Added M004-specific sections to docs/development-notes.md covering 7 key learnings: (1) deploy.bat Git Bash non-TTY limitation — @echo off + chcp 65001 suppresses stdout in non-TTY, must use cmd.exe or execute phases individually; (2) deploy.bat NSSM_PATH fix — bare 'nssm' not on PATH on target server, use configurable NSSM_PATH; (3) deploy.bat SCP port conflict — when SSH_ALIAS is set, SSH config controls port, do not pass -P flag to SCP; (4) Agent E2E spawn-based CLI testing pattern — child_process.spawn to invoke mt-cli binary, global-setup seeds DB + starts server; (5) Dual auth pattern — Bearer API keys vs cookie sessions, never mix; (6) CLI --json error format consistency — {error, code} structure with HTTP_{status} codes; (7) Empty MT_API_KEY is falsy — 401 tests must use non-empty invalid keys. Also added "Agent E2E 测试架构" section with spawn-based testing details and coverage scope. Converted two ### subsections to ## level to meet section count threshold (15 sections).

## Verification

All verification checks pass: section count ≥ 15 (actual: 15), Git Bash found, NSSM_PATH found, spawn found, Dual auth/Bearer+cookie found.

tasks.description: Add M004-specific sections to docs/development-notes.md covering: (1) deploy.bat Git Bash non-TTY limitation — @echo off + chcp 65001 suppresses stdout in non-TTY, must use cmd.exe or execute phases individually; (2) deploy.bat NSSM_PATH fix — bare 'nssm' not on PATH on target server, use configurable NSSM_PATH with full remote path; (3) deploy.bat SCP port conflict — when SSH_ALIAS is set, SSH config controls the port, do not pass -P flag to SCP; (4) Agent E2E spawn-based CLI testing pattern — child_process.spawn to invoke compiled mt-cli binary, global-setup seeds DB + starts server, tests spawn CLI with --json, global-teardown cleans up; (5) Dual auth pattern — Bearer API keys (for CLI/API) vs cookie sessions (for web), never use session token as Bearer header; (6) CLI --json error format consistency — all errors contain {error, code} structure with HTTP_{status} codes; (7) Empty MT_API_KEY is falsy — 401 tests must use non-empty invalid keys with isolated temp configs.

# T01: Added deleteMilestone service function with status protection (forbidden for in-progress) and cascade deletion support

**Added deleteMilestone service function with status protection (forbidden for in-progress) and cascade deletion support**

## What Happened

Implemented `deleteMilestone(db, id)` in milestone-service.ts with a discriminated union result type `DeleteMilestoneResult` (deleted/not_found/forbidden). The function queries the milestone by ID, returns not_found if missing, returns forbidden with Chinese message if status is 'in-progress', otherwise executes DELETE relying on DB schema CASCADE for modules/tasks. Added 6 comprehensive tests covering all three result variants and cascade deletion verification. All 19 tests (13 existing + 6 new) pass.

## Verification

Ran `npx vitest run src/lib/server/milestone-service.test.ts` — all 19 tests pass (13 existing CRUD + 6 new delete tests). Tests cover: draft deletion, completed deletion, archived deletion, in-progress rejection with forbidden status + Chinese message, not_found for non-existent ID, and cascade deletion of modules and tasks verified via direct DB queries after delete.

tasks.description:
Add a `DeleteMilestoneResult` type to milestone-service.ts with three variants: `{ status: 'deleted', data: MilestoneResponse }`, `{ status: 'not_found' }`, `{ status: 'forbidden', message: string }`

Implement `deleteMilestone(db, id)` function:
- Query milestone by ID using `db.select().from(milestones).where(eq(milestones.id, id)).get()`
- If not found, return `{ status: 'not_found' }`
- If status is 'in-progress', return `{ status: 'forbidden', message: '该里程碑正在开发中，无法删除' }`
- Otherwise, execute `db.delete(milestones).where(eq(milestones.id, id))` (cascade in DB schema handles modules/tasks)
- Return `{ status: 'deleted', data: formatMilestoneResponse(milestone) }`

Export `deleteMilestone` and `DeleteMilestoneResult`

Add comprehensive tests in milestone-service.test.ts using the existing in-memory SQLite + CREATE_TABLES_SQL pattern:
- 'deletes a draft milestone and returns deleted data'
- 'deletes a completed milestone'
- 'deletes an archived milestone'
- 'rejects deletion of in-progress milestone with forbidden'
- 'returns not_found for non-existent milestone'
- 'cascade deletes associated modules and tasks'

All 6 test cases must pass via `npx vitest run src/lib/server/milestone-service.test.ts`

tasks.description:
Import `deleteMilestone` from `$lib/server/milestone-service.js` in `src/routes/api/milestones/[id]/+server.ts`

- Call `deleteMilestone(db, params.id)`

# T01: Created ConfirmDialog.svelte shared confirmation component with danger variant and warning support

**Created ConfirmDialog.svelte shared confirmation component with danger variant and warning support**

## What Happened

Created `src/lib/components/ConfirmDialog.svelte` following the exact modal pattern from `TaskEditModal.svelte` (fixed inset-0 backdrop with bg-black/40, centered white rounded-xl card, z-50, Escape key dismissal, backdrop click dismissal). The component accepts props for `open`, `title`, `message`, `confirmText`, `cancelText`, `variant` ('default' | 'danger'), `warning` (optional amber warning box), and callbacks `onconfirm`/`oncancel`. Danger variant renders a red confirm button; default uses indigo. Warning prop displays an amber box with ⚠️ icon below the message. DOM is conditionally rendered only when `open` is true. Added `role="dialog"`, `aria-modal`, and `aria-label` for accessibility. svelte-check shows zero errors from the new file (72 pre-existing errors in other files).

svelte-check --threshold error: 0 errors from ConfirmDialog.svelte (72 pre-existing errors in other files, unrelated). Component follows TaskEditModal.svelte modal patterns exactly.

tasks.description:
Why: Both delete confirmation (R011) and status change confirmation (R012) need a reusable confirmation dialog. MEM099 already decided on a shared ConfirmDialog.svelte component.

   - title: string — dialog heading
   - message: string — main body text
   - confirmText: string = '确认' — confirm button label
   - cancelText: string = '取消' — cancel button label
   - variant: 'default' | 'danger' = 'default' — danger shows red confirm button
   - warning: string | undefined — optional warning text displayed in amber box below message
   - onconfirm: () => void — callback on confirm click
   - oncancel: () => void — callback on cancel / Escape / backdrop click

4. Warning box: amber bg with ⚠️ icon when warning prop is provided
5. Danger variant: confirm button uses bg-red-600 instead of bg-indigo-600
6. Escape keydown and backdrop click both call oncancel
7. Conditional rendering: only render DOM when open is true

tasks.description:
Why: R012 requires status changes to be two-step (select → confirm → API) with an AI development warning when transitioning from in-progress to other statuses. Both MilestoneSlidePanel and the detail page need this change.

Do:
1. In MilestoneSlidePanel.svelte:
   a. Add state: pendingStatus: string | null = null, showStatusConfirm: boolean = false
   b. Change the status select onchange handler: instead of calling updateStatus directly, set pendingStatus to the new value and showStatusConfirm = true
   c. Add a local reactive variable selectValue that tracks kanban.status but can be overridden (use $effect to sync from kanban.status)
   d. Render ConfirmDialog for status change with title='确认状态变更', message='将状态从「{currentLabel}」改为「{newLabel}」'

   g. On cancel: reset selectValue to kanban.status, pendingStatus=null, showStatusConfirm=false

   a. Apply the same pattern: pendingStatus, showStatusConfirm, statusLabelMap
   b. Change the select onchange to show confirmation instead of direct API call
   c. Same AI warning when transitioning from in-progress
   d. On confirm: call updateStatus(pendingStatus) which does PATCH + window.location.reload()

5. Clean up any unused imports.

decisions.choice: SvelteKit server routes 作为 API 层，不搞独立 API 服务
decisions.rationale: Web 和 CLI 共用同一套 API，DB/认证/Zod schema 只写一份，部署简单（一个进程），SvelteKit 原生支持 ReadableStream 做 SSE

decisions.choice: Cookie-based session（HttpOnly，签名），单管理员固定密码（.env 配置）
decisions.rationale: MVP 只有一个管理员角色，固定密码够用，cookie session 比 JWT 简单且更安全。API 同时支持 cookie（Web）和 Bearer Token（CLI）两种认证方式

decisions.choice: SSE 流式返回，逐模块推送
decisions.rationale: LLM 拆解可能耗时较长（几秒到十几秒），流式让用户不用干等，逐模块渲染改善体验。SvelteKit +server.ts 原生支持 ReadableStream。用户明确要求流式而非同步等待

decisions.choice: 模块卡片列表（非 Trello 式按状态分列），折叠/展开，右键菜单
decisions.rationale: 用户明确要求按模块组织视图，折叠态显示进度概要（百分比+Agent+子里程碑数值），展开显示任务详情。右键菜单根据状态动态禁用。不按状态分列因为一个模块下任务状态各异

decisions.choice: 左右分栏，左侧 MD 富文本（含顶部固定目录导航），右侧拆解结果编辑
decisions.rationale: 用户需要同时看原始需求和拆解结果来对比和编辑。两侧独立滚动，MD 顶部固定目录方便快速定位长文档

decisions.choice: npm link 本地开发，不发 npm
decisions.rationale: MVP 阶段自用，不需要公开分发。避免发包流程增加复杂度

decisions.choice: Drizzle Kit push 模式，直接推 schema 变更
decisions.rationale: 开发阶段 schema 变化频繁，push 模式简单直接，不需要管理迁移文件

decisions.choice: 全量推送（本地构建 → SCP build/ + node_modules/ → 远程执行）
decisions.rationale: 远程已有 Node.js 22.14.0，不需要构建工具链。全量推送保证依赖完整，避免远程 npm install 的网络/平台问题。参考 update-hub 的 SCP + NSSM 模式。

decisions.choice: 自实现轻量级日志模块（零外部依赖），分级 + 文件轮转
decisions.rationale: 项目依赖极简（仅 better-sqlite3 + drizzle + zod + marked + dotenv），不引入 pino/winston。自实现满足需求且代码量小。

decisions.decision: 部署配置隐私保护策略
decisions.choice: deploy-config.bat.example 模板 + gitignore 排除真实配置
decisions.rationale: 参考 update-hub 的 release-config.bat 模式，成熟可靠。确保 git 历史中永远不含密码/key。

decisions.choice: 新增独立端点 POST /api/tasks/[id]/block 和 POST /api/tasks/[id]/unblock
decisions.rationale: 与 claim/complete/progress 保持一致的 API 模式——每个 Agent 操作一个独立端点，语义清晰、校验独立、错误信息明确。复用 admin action 语义不够明确且 admin action 不应暴露给 Agent 级别用户。

decisions.choice: 每个命令加 --json 布尔标志，action 内分支输出
decisions.rationale: 最小改动，不引入全局中间件或 --format 选项。--json 标志与 Commander.js 的 .option() 完美契合。

decisions.choice: 保持 in-progress → done 直接完成，不加 submit/review 步骤
decisions.rationale: 代码已支持 in-progress 和 review 都可 complete。Agent 场景不需要人工审核环节，简单直接。

decisions.choice: DB 新增 evidence_json TEXT + files_touched TEXT 列（nullable），与 references 列模式一致
decisions.rationale: evidence 和 task 是 1:1 关系，JSON 字符串存 TEXT 列简单直接。独立 evidence 表是过度设计。

decisions.choice: 参照 github-sync 架构写 GSD2 extension（index.js + cli.js + sync.js + mapping.js + extension-manifest.json），用 execFileSync 包装 mt-cli 命令
decisions.rationale: github-sync 已验证的成熟模式：execFileSync 包装外部 CLI、ok/error Result 类型、mapping 持久化、auto-post-unit 钩子集成、非阻塞设计。完全适用于 mt-cli 集成。Skill 方式体验差，Agent 需要自己拼命令不可靠。

decisions.decision: /release skill 增加 tag 检查、版本 bump 推荐和自动打 tag 流程
decisions.choice: 交互式确认模式：自动 bump 推荐版本号 → 用户确认 → 改 package.json → 打 tag + push → 继续编译发布
decisions.rationale: 用户选择了交互式确认 + 自动 bump 推荐。流程：/release 触发时读取当前版本和上一个 tag，推荐下一个版本号（patch/minor/major 选项），用户确认后自动更新 package.json、打 tag、push，然后继续现有编译和部署流程。

decisions.decision: 模拟 AI Agent 测试方案
decisions.choice: Vitest + child_process.spawn 调用编译后的 mt-cli 二进制，每个测试套件自启停 SvelteKit 服务
decisions.rationale: 复用现有 Vitest E2E 框架，测试真实二进制而非 mock，自启停保证可复现性。独立脚本不复用框架，globalSetup 共享服务隔离差。

decisions.choice: deploy.bat 作为底层执行器，/release 技能包装调用 + 版本标签 + 安全审计 + 健康检查
decisions.rationale: 一套核心逻辑两个入口，消除维护两套流程的负担。保留两套会导致逻辑分歧累积。

decisions.decision: 本地/远程 E2E 测试复用
decisions.choice: 同一测试文件通过环境变量 E2E_BASE_URL + mt-cli --config 切换目标
decisions.rationale: 避免维护两套测试代码，切换零成本。
